lastReleaseMessage: Restore dates.ts after a botched regex replacement in the...

barRaise.topFinding: Fifteenth daily report and the diff against 06-09 is nothing: HEAD is still 23d2e3d (the 06-08 hardening batch), so no commit landed in two days and the cleanup the last report said would land this at healthy never happened. All three MEDIUMs ride verbatim: write-dashboard-status.ps1 hardcodes milestone M2 on a v0.4.1 app, DESIGN.md is still pinned to v0.3.0 two releases behind package.json, and discord-notify.ps1's em-dash sanitizer still targets the mojibake byte form instead of [char]0x2014. Zero HIGH, no running-app bug exposure, every survivor is doc-or-script hygiene fixable in one commit. The sharper signal is meta: a read-only daily pass has now re-confirmed an identical static finding set two days running with no new input, which is exactly the trigger to drop bar-raise-scheduler-daily to twice-weekly.
